title: diosma aulonophila
intro: Diosma aulonophila, also known as Round-leaved Diosma, is a small, shrub-like plant that belongs to the Rutaceae family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Diosma aulonophila include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
